html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

“Creates pretty sparkles when added to a fire..”

-

The Sulfuric Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using Charcoal and a Rotten Egg, and depleting 10 for the player. The experiment has a 50% chance to result in Sulfuric Crystals of Lime and a 50% chance to result in Sulfuric Crystals of Saltpeter.

Both potions can be used as Fuel for a Fire, causing different sparkling effects each.

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. There is a 20% chance to craft 3, a 60% chance to craft 4, and a 20% chance to craft 5. All potions created in a single crafting will be the same variant.

Trivia

  • The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items except for the Lunar Experiment were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.

Gallery

  • All Hallowed Nights potions except for the Steeped Lunar Essence on the ground.
  • Concept art for various potions from Rhymes with Play #212.
Hallowed NightsCraftable Items

“Crystalized inferno.”
–Wilson
“I didn't think it was possible to make fire better.”
–Willow
“Is making fire go boom boom!”
–Wolfgang
“I wish I possessed such burning within my heart.”
–Wendy
“SPECTACLE INDUCING CRYSTALS”
–WX-78
“It appears combustible.”
–Wickerbottom
“It'll never replace a good hunk of wood.”
–Woodie
“Might as well throw it in the fire.”
–Maxwell
“Hel's fuel.”
–Wigfrid
“Neat! It's like firecrackers.”
–Webber
“The fire has caramelized.”
–Warly
“Ka-POW! inside”
–Wormwood
“Ohh. This'll make a spark.”
–Winona
“Firewater!”
–Wortox
“Sparkle bottle.”
–Wurt
“It should only be handled by someone who knows fire safety. Like me!”
–Walter
“This might have been a frivolous use of my time..."”
–Wanda
“Creates pretty sparkles when added to a fire..”
-

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thí nghiệm Sulfuric là một tính năng dành riêng cho sự kiện Đêm thiêng liêng trong Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tiến hành tại Phòng thí nghiệm khoa học điên, sử dụng Than và Trứng thối, đồng thời làm cạn kiệt 10 điểm của người chơi. Thí nghiệm có 50% cơ hội tạo ra Tinh thể lưu huỳnh của vôi và 50% cơ hội tạo ra Tinh thể lưu huỳnh của muối tiêu.

The '''Sulfuric Experiment''' is a feature exclusive to the [[Hallowed Nights]] [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be conducted at the [[Mad Scientist Lab]], using [[Charcoal]] and a [[Rotten Egg]], and depleting 10 {{Sanity}} for the player. The experiment has a 50% chance to result in '''Sulfuric Crystals of Lime''' and a 50% chance to result in '''Sulfuric Crystals of Saltpeter'''.

Both potions can be used as [[Fuel]] for a [[Fire]], causing different sparkling effects each.

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. There is a 20% chance to craft 3, a 60% chance to craft 4, and a 20% chance to craft 5. All potions created in a single crafting will be the same variant.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items except for the [[Lunar Experiment]] were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
